element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Foundation combat mechanic; enemies drop power-ups and jewels when defeated
Collected from defeated enemies; augments firepower

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Level 1 (as enemy attack and as player weapon)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players learn to dodge incoming homing missiles; later acquire as built-in special weapon
Hazard requiring navigation around fixed fire patterns
Defensive/offensive orbiting weapon collected from enemies
Forces player to navigate around rather than destroy; introduces spatial puzzle element
Combination of multiple enemy types and hazards; tests integrated skill

typical_relief_triggers: Clearing all enemies from current screen
typical_tension_triggers: Multiple enemy types on same screen
Gun turret fire patterns to avoid
Time limit pressure (mission has specified time constraint)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced combat with screen-by-screen intensity peaks; flip-screen transitions provide micro-relief points; overall tension escalates from Level 1 through Level 3 as hazard combinations increase

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to basic enemy ships and simple power-ups; single hazard types per screen; teaches core shooting and dodging
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Combination hazards introduced; indestructible fixed-path enemies require navigation strategy; multiple weapon types available for tactical choice
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex mixed hazard screens; combined enemy types and environmental obstacles; time limit pressure heightened; mastery of all mechanics required
notable_spikes: Transition to Level 2: introduction of indestructible enemies and mixed hazard screens
Level 3 progression: escalating hazard density and complexity of enemy/obstacle combinations

notable_level_patterns.description: Early screens present one hazard type (only enemy ships, OR only homing missiles, OR only gun turrets) to isolate learning
Multiple hazard types on same screen requiring integrated tactical response
Screens with indestructible fixed-path enemies that must be traversed around rather than destroyed
Discrete screen-by-screen traversal (no scrolling) with each screen as tactical unit; completion triggers advance to next screen
